title: King's Bounty: The Legend

notes: Very low fps on global map and battles, used by newest proton version
title: King's Bounty: The Legend

notes: Very low fps, barely playable when there is lot of animation ( for example dragon "test" chamber)
title: King's Bounty: The Legend

notes: Played through to about the second to last island. No matter what tweaks I attempted, the game suffers horrific lag during combat that renders it borderline unplayable. Also encountered a few texture and sizing bugs.
title: King's Bounty: The Legend

notes:
The game runs horribly out of the box (3-10 fps in battle), but I've managed to fix this issue with the use of popsUlfr's Proton build (Proton 3.16-6 Gallium Nine Extras 0.3.0). After that the game has pretty good performance.

After some time, though, I've experienced crashes and textures not loading - turns out the game has been running out of memory. This can be fixed with the large address aware.

After all this I played for ~5 hours and haven't experienced a single major issue.
title: King's Bounty: The Legend

notes: Performance issues make this nearly unplayable. Attempts to use D9VK resulted in crash on new game.
title: King's Bounty: The Legend
